title: 3級 模擬テスト6 会話文 1

title: 3級 模擬テスト6 リスニング第1部 1
prompt:
対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 6-1]
audioText:
A: Did you enjoy the travel planning in London, Nancy?
B: Yes, but it was a bit crowded. Over 217 people were there.
A: I see. Would you go there again?
explanation: grade3-06-listening1-01: リスニング第1部の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 3級 模擬テスト6 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is London planning to organize more events?
[Mock 6-1]
passage: Recently, travel planning has become very popular in London. Since 2021, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 217 more events related to travel planning.
choices: Because they want to make money.
Because no one joined the events.
Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade3-06-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

passage: Recently, healthy meals has become very popular in Kyoto. Since 2022, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 224 more events related to healthy meals.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.

与えられたテーマに沿った、適切な構成と内容の解答
